title: Add frontend best-version metric options
description: Expose frontend controls for best optimizer versions and sorting by precision, recall, and cost, not only alignment/accuracy. Keep this zero-schema and use existing indexed optimizer/evaluation data.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented frontend metric controls for optimizer procedure/version surfaces: procedure sorting now supports feedback/regression alignment, accuracy, precision, recall, and cost; procedure menus expose matching best evaluation and best version actions; optimizer workbench candidate sorting now supports the same metric set. Verified focused Jest tests and dashboard typecheck.
